# RFQ - 2026 - Police Department Building Camera's

Bid/RFP Status

Closed - no longer accepting bids and proposals

Bid/RFP Due Date

Fri, 01/30/2026 - 2:00 PM

[Back to Bids/RFPs](https://www.ci.woodland.wa.us/rfps)

#### City of Woodland

#### Request for Qualifications for Licensed Installation Company for Camera Installation

#### Submittal Deadline: 01/30/2026

CITY OF WOODLAND REQUEST FOR QUALIFICATION INFORMATION FOR ON CALL SECURITY CAMERA MAINTANCE SPECAILIST AND TO Upgrade the Woodland Police Department Video system to 4K and 8K Cameras and equipment.

The City of Woodland (City) is inviting statements of qualifications and expertise in installation of camera system, running new wiring and providing storage of database for a minimum of 30 days hard drive and back up on cloud base service.

The City reserves the right to amend terms of this request of qualifications (RFQ) to circulate various addenda, or to withdraw the RFQ at any time, regardless of time and effort consultants have spent on their responses.

Estimated schedule: Submittals due 01/30/2026 BY 2:00pm. Interviews (as needed) and selection by 02/13/2026. Contract execution by 02/17/2026. Project to be completed by 04/30/2026

List of Expectations:

1. Installation of Openeye Enterprise NVR-w/32TB Storage.

2. TRENDnet 26 -port Gigabit PoE+Switch

3. (6) 4K/MP IP Dome Camera (Exterior)

4. (4) Platinum 4mp IP Dome Camera 2/8 Fixed lens

5. (8) Platinum 4mp IP Dome Camera – Audio

6. New hardware and wiring.

7. 30 days of Media Storage

8. 24-48 Maintenance Response Time


Qualification and performance statements will be reviewed. Resumes will be accepted but not required. Limit the RFQ to ten (10) pages, single sided. One printed copy is required of any document submitted

Any cost proposals or elements of cost will be provided in a concealed format and separate from the technical/qualifications proposals, since these shall not be considered in the evaluation, ranking, and selection phase.

Submittals will be evaluated and ranked based on the following criteria:

(1) Equipment brand and quality

(2) Equipment Availability

(3) Time frame of installation

(4)Technician response time if system needs service or fails.

(5) Technician Experience

Questions regarding this invitation should be directed to: Sgt. Robb Lipp, Woodland Police Department [lippr@woodlandpd.org](mailto:lippr@woodlandpd.org) 360-225-6965 Ext. 412.

Submittals from interested individuals MUST be receive no later than 1/30/2026by 2:00PM by hand delivering to City Hall 230 Davidson Avenue or by mail to P.O. Box 9, Woodland, WA 98674.

Americans with Disabilities Act (ADA) Information: The City, in accordance with Section 504 of the Rehabilitation (Section 504) and the ADA, commits to nondiscrimination on the basis of disability, in all of its programs and activities. The material can be made available in an alternate format by emailing \[insert name and email\] or by calling \[insert phone number\].

Title VI Statement: The City, in accordance with the provisions of Title VI of the Civil Rights Ave of 1964 (78 Stat. 252, 42 U.S.C. 2000d to 2000d-4) and the regulations, hereby notifies all bidders that it will affirmatively ensure that in any contract entered into pursuant to the advertisement, disadvantaged business enterprises will be afforded full and fair opportunity to submit bids in response to this invitation and will not be discriminated against on the grounds of race, color, or national origin in consideration for an award.
